description: Composition Green, white and blue striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has a small spread collar, a V-neckline, full sleeves with buttoned cuffs and a mid-arm tab, full buttoned placket, a patch pocket on the left chest and a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Perfect in style and great in comfort, this shirt from wrangler makes for great casual wear. The three quarter sleeves create a feel of casual comfort, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim fit jeans and sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
